steps.observed: Failed to fetch URL: Unsupported image type for `https://example.com`. NVIDIA managed CV endpoints require png/jpeg/jpg data URLs.
[pipeline] Running OCR on https://httpbin.org/image/png... OCR failed with status 401: Header of type `authorization` was missing
Failed to fetch URL: Could not resolve image source `invalid-url`.

evidence.network: CLI fetches URL and attempts OCR

frictions.description: OCR requires NVIDIA API key for full end-to-end test without authentication error
frictions.resolution: The 401 authorization error is expected behavior - OCR correctly attempts to process fetched content but requires API key for NVIDIA CV endpoint

summary: Tested VAL-URL-001: URL accepted as input. The --url flag is correctly recognized, URL fetching works, and OCR is attempted on fetched content. CLI properly validates URLs and handles errors appropriately. The 401 OCR error is expected without API key.
